page_content:
BIOE608 Bioengineering Seminar Series (1 Credit)

A variety of topics related to Bioengineering will be presented in weekly seminars.

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (ENGR: PhD Only- Bioengineering (Master's); ENGR: PhD Only-Bioengineering (Doctoral)). Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
